---
title: "Completing attestation questionnaires"
date: last-modified
---

Complete attestation questionnaires to document and verify model attributes at a specific point in time. This process allows model owners to review snapshots of their model data and provide attestations through a structured questionnaire.

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] The model is already registered in the model inventory.[^1]
- [x] An attestation has been created and is in the [{{< fa clipboard >}} Not Started]{.bubble} state.[^2]
- [x] You are the model owner or have sufficient permissions to complete attestations.[^3]

:::

## Steps

1. When prompted on your dashboard, click **Open Attestations {{< fa arrow-right >}}**

   Alternatively, you can access attestations for your models by clicking **{{< fa clipboard >}} Attestations** in one of these pages:
   - Inventory
   - Findings

2. In the **Attestations** sidebar on the right, click an active attestation request to start the process.

   The view that opens shows you a model snapshot at the point in time when the attestation was created.

3. Click **Start Attestation**.

4. Document the status change to [{{< fa clipboard >}} In Progress]{.bubble} in the notes field and click **Confirm**.

   After confirming, the attestation questionnaire becomes available for completion.

5. In the right sidebar, complete the attestation questionnaire:
   - Review the model snapshot and findings
   - Check applicable boxes
   - Add relevant comments where needed

6. Click **Submit for Review**.

7. Document the status change in the notes field for your reviewer and click **Confirm**.

   The attestation is sent to the validator associated with the model at the time the snapshot was taken.

::: {.callout}
The attestation sidebar is persistent between findings and inventory views, making it easy to reference attestation information while reviewing other model details.
:::

::: {.callout}
If your attestation is rejected, you'll need to revise your responses and resubmit for review. The system maintains a history of all status changes and notes.
:::

## What's next

- [Reviewing attestation questionnaires](reviewing-attestation-questionnaires.qmd)
- [View attestation activity](view-attestation-activity.qmd)

<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Register models in the inventory](/guide/model-inventory/register-models-in-inventory.qmd)

[^2]: [Create attestation](create-attestation.qmd)

[^3]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)
